name:name: # ^ Tier-A row patch (mod_overrides.md §4) on core Spell.tsv: this expansion buffs
# ^ DEMO of Phase 7 (§8.3): core Spell.tsv's `totalDamage` column has an EXPRESSION
# ^ It was evaluated at load (25.0 * 1.5 = 37.5). After this patch changes baseDamage,
# ^ the engine RE-EVALUATES the downstream =expr cell, so fireball.totalDamage becomes
# ^ 40.0 * 1.5 = 60.0 automatically — the mod does not have to patch totalDamage itself.
